1122 declared assets minus 519 checked sitemap URLs; relationship cannot be proven from available artifacts alone
classification.evidence: Phase 5A final readiness required count reconciliation before Phase 5B pass

explanation: The 519 value is a live sitemap URL count, not a full career asset count. It includes 372 career URLs, of which 341 are career job detail URLs. Backend sitemap-source currently returns 2192 total items and 1952 career items before frontend sitemap filtering. The declared 1122 Career Full Public Resolution assets cannot be fully reconciled to sitemap URLs because aliases, locale variants, backend-only assets, non-indexable assets, and public-resolution-but-not-indexed assets are not all emitted as sitemap URLs.
requiredFollowUp: Export backend career asset master counts by asset kind: canonical job, alias, locale variant, family, guide, recommendation, index-only, noindex.
Add a read-only count endpoint or governance export for career public resolution inventory if Phase 5C requires exact reconciliation.
Clarify whether the 1122 count includes aliases and locale variants or only canonical pages.
Compare backend SEO authority filtering reasons for the 1927 career job source items against the 341 live sitemap career job pages.
